data.rules:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Joe Biden makes a new public or digital appearance between September 30, 7:00 PM ET and October 15, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A public appearance includes, for example, an appearance at a press conference. A digital appearance must be verified as new, authentic footage (not AI-generated). For instance, if Biden appears in a new prerecorded speech, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Biden must be awake for this market to resolve to "Yes".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

action.reasoning: The market price is at 1.00, indicating certainty that Biden will make an appearance. However, the news indicates Biden is undergoing radiation therapy for cancer, which may limit his public appearances. There is no new confirmed appearance within the specified timeframe. Given the price and lack of new information confirming an appearance, I will hold my position.

news.content:
Latest Joe Biden News | Top Headlines on Joe Biden | Reuters

# Joe Biden
Follow
## Latest Stories
* [Worldcategory] ·February 2, 2026
[Exclusive: US envoys to Israel blocked early warning of Gaza ‘Apocalyptic Wasteland’] 
U.S. Agency for International Development staffers in early 2024 drafted a warning to senior officials in Joe Biden’s administration: Northern Gaza had turned into an “Apocalyptic Wasteland” with dire shortages of food and medical aid.
[
![Palestinians walk past the rubble of residential buildings destroyed during the war, in Jabalia] 
] 
* [United Statescategory] ·December 2, 2025
[Trump says he's terminating any Biden pardons signed with autopen] 
U.S. President Donald Trump said on Tuesday he is terminating all documents, including pardons, that he said his predecessor Joe Biden had signed using an autopen, a move that legal experts doubted would hold up in court.
[
![U.S. President Donald Trump at the White House in Washington] 
] 
* [United Statescategory] ·October 11, 2025
[Former US President Biden undergoing radiation therapy for cancer, spokesperson says] 
Former U.S. President Joe Biden is receiving radiation therapy for his prostate cancer diagnosed in May, a spokesperson for him said on Saturday.
[
![Former U.S. President Joe Biden makes his first speech since leaving office in Chicago] 
] 
* [Worldcategory] ·October 3, 2025
[Biden ban on offshore drilling in vast areas was illegal, court rules] 
Former U.S. President Joe Biden exceeded his authority by withdrawing large areas along U.S. coastlines from future offshore oil and gas development, a federal judge in Louisiana ruled on Thursday.
[
]

[White House trolls Biden with portrait featuring his autopen signature]
